artifacts.description: Workbook with executive summary, unified timeline, process sample analysis, tag-change diff, ATT&CK for ICS mapping, source notes, and safety-margin charts.
Safety-first OT incident recovery and restart runbook for Solvent Recovery Column C-240 with evidence preservation and restart gates.

notes: Workbook generated with a scripted fallback because @oai/artifact-tool was unavailable in the local runtime.
Workbook package integrity was validated by ZIP CRC check and XML parsing of all workbook members.
